title: Data & Sync
subtitle: Transfer data between devices and cloud sync
exportDescription: Save all your data to a file — as a backup or to move to another device
importDescription: Import data from a file created on another device
howToStep1: On the old device: export a file
howToStep2: Move the file to the new device (drive, messenger, USB stick)
howToStep3: On the new device: "Import from file"
howToStep4: The data will be merged (not overwritten)
supabaseHint: Add VITE_SUPABASE_URL and VITE_SUPABASE_ANON_KEY to the .env file and rebuild the app.
keyDescription: The sync key is your private key. No email, no registration. Keep it in a safe place.
keyPlaceholder: Paste a sync key or create a new one
importSuccess: Data imported successfully! The page will reload.
